page_metadata.biotools__summary: This package fits a Michaelis-Menten model to the pattern of dropouts in single-cell RNASeq data. This model is used as a null to identify significantly variable (i.e. differentially expressed) genes for use in downstream analysis, such as clustering cells.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: This package fits a Michaelis-Menten model to the pattern of dropouts in single-cell RNASeq data. This model is used as a null to identify significantly variable (i.e. differentially expressed) genes for use in downstream analysis, such as clustering cells.
